code:
import string
import list

fn validate(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> List<String>
  mut errs: List<String> = []
  if string.is_empty(name)
    errs = append_str(errs, "empty-name")
  end
  if age < 0
    errs = append_str(errs, "negative-age")
  end
  if age > 150
    errs = append_str(errs, "too-old")
  end
  errs
end

fn append_str(_ xs: List<String>, _ s: String) -> List<String>
  mut result: List<String> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      result = push_str(result, v)
    when None
      result = result
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  push_str(result, s)
end

fn push_str(_ xs: List<String>, _ s: String) -> List<String>
  mut out: List<String> = [s]
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      out = prepend_after(out, v, i)
    when None
      out = out
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

fn prepend_after(_ xs: List<String>, _ s: String, _ idx: Int) -> List<String>
  xs
end

fn report(_ errs: List<String>) -> Unit
  if errs.len() == 0
    println("ok")
  else
    mut joined = ""
    mut i = 0
    while i < errs.len()
      match errs.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        if i == 0
          joined = "#{v}"
        else
          joined = "#{joined},#{v}"
        end
      when None
        joined = joined
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println("errors=#{joined}")
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  report(validate("", -5))
  report(validate("Alice", 30))
  report(validate("Bob", 200))
end
